Maria Wellington

Curious builder, community leader, and lifelong learner.

Class of 2028 · Interested in Performing Arts, Outdoor Education

  • Get in touch

About Maria

I am a high school student passionate about STEM, the performing arts, and leadership. I attend Chief Sealth International High School and am preparing for the IB Diploma Programme. Alongside challenging coursework and community involvement, I have a deep love for music, theater, and creative expression. I also love wilderness canoe tripping and have spent the last several summers at Camp Wabun in Temagami, Ontario, where I built resilience, teamwork, and outdoor leadership skills. This site shares my academics, activities, and achievements as I prepare for college.

Academic Focus

Chief Sealth International High School

Current

Student at Chief Sealth International High School, building a strong academic foundation for college.

IB Diploma Programme

Upcoming

Preparing to enter the International Baccalaureate (IB) Diploma Programme with a focus on rigorous, interdisciplinary learning.
